feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: iflow content modifer Issue
entry.content:
Hi team

I am working with  an Iflow,  this Iflow  is a copy of the Iflow: Replicate Generic Data from SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central to SAP ERP or SAP S4HANA Using the OData API

This is Namespace Mapping

Content modifier

This is the configuration in Content Modifier

 

The value in Source value to ECCOMPANY is /ns0:getGenericDataReplicationQuery/ProcessingParameter[Name='ECCompany']/Value

I am running a simulation

Simulation is sending this error message

Invalid xpath: /ns0:getGenericDataReplicationQuery/ProcessingParameter[Name='ECCompany']/Value. Reason: javax.xml.xpath.XPathExpressionException: Failure converting a node of class javax.xml.transform.sax.SAXSource: org.xml.sax.SAXParseException; lineNumber: 1; columnNumber: 1; Premature end of file.

Do you know how to solve it?

Thanks a lot

entry.title: XML tags as list in Content Modifier
entry.content:
Hello community,

I would like to output all XML tags with the same name (for example, <value>) as a list using a Content Modifier in SAP CPI. The XPath //value doesn't work for this.

Does anyone have an idea?

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Connecting SAP S/4hana system onpremise to Non SAP Systems using Integration suite
entry.content: how to connect S/4hana system  to Non SAP systems using CPI.

entry.title: 404 undocumented error in Integration Suite Learning Journey in GW SAMPLE
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am recentlyexperiencing a 404 Undocumented error in the learning journey : https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-with-sap-integration-suite 

The error occurs while we try to test the GET response to the API created from the GWSAMPLE BASIC .

Can anyone please help me out in this case. I am also attaching the SS of the same.

SAP Integration Suite API Management

entry.title: Ariba to third party how to extract the attachments with cid in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

Introduction:

In SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI), handling MIME messages, especially when extracting PDFs or documents from a cid (Content-ID) reference within a URL tag, can be challenging and how to decode the attachment in CPI.

Understanding MIME Messages:

MIME (Multipurpose Internet Mail Extensions) messages allow the inclusion of various media types (like PDFs, images, etc.) in email messages and other internet communications. In an SAP CPI context, these messages often need to be decoded and processed to extract attachments referenced by cid URLs.

 

The Challenge:

You might encounter a scenario where the MIME decoder does not work as expected in SAP CPI. This can be problematic when you need to extract embedded documents (like PDFs or DOCs) that are referenced by a cid in the URL tag of your XML payload.

Sample payload 

Content-Type: multipart/related; type="text/xml"; start="12345@domain.com"; boundary="boundary123"

 

--boundary123

Content-Type: text/xml; charset="utf-8"

Content-ID: <12345@domain.com>

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>

<cXML version="1.2.020" xml:lang="en-US">

    <Request>

        <InvoiceDetailRequest>

            <InvoiceDetailRequestHeader>

                <Comments>This is a comment [Attachment 1]</Comments>

            </InvoiceDetailRequestHeader>

            <Attachment>

                <URL>cid:attachment1.pdf</URL>

            </Attachment>

        </InvoiceDetailRequest>

    </Request>

</cXML>

 

--boundary123

Content-Type: application/pdf

Content-ID: <attachment1.pdf>

Content-Transfer-Encoding: base64

 

JVBERi0xLj

QKJcfs...

--boundary123--

 

Thanks,

Ajay Kumar

entry.title: API Error "Error in document: BKPFF $ 0M5R9UL"
entry.content:
I used POSTMAN to run the API that creates the journal entries. Specifically, I want to create invoices for my clients.
However, I am getting errors. Since this is a verification, I am trying with the same items as the vouchers already registered in S4HC. So it is not possible that there is a lack of items or values.
I would like to know how to resolve this.

 

【API Body】

<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:sfin="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN">
   <soapenv:Header/>
   <soapenv:Body>
      <sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>
         <MessageHeader>
            <ID>MSG_2018-06-05</ID>
            <!--<ReferenceID></ReferenceID>-->
            <CreationDateTime>2024-08-15T12:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
         </MessageHeader>
         <!--1 or more repetitions:-->
         <JournalEntryCreateRequest>
            <MessageHeader>
               <ID>SUB_MSG_2018-06-05</ID>
               <!--<ReferenceID></ReferenceID>-->
               <CreationDateTime>2024-08-15T12:00:00.1234567Z</CreationDateTime>
            </MessageHeader>
            <JournalEntry>
               <OriginalReferenceDocumentType>BKPFF</OriginalReferenceDocumentType>
               <OriginalReferenceDocument/>
               <OriginalReferenceDocumentLogicalSystem/>
               <BusinessTransactionType>RFBU</BusinessTransactionType>
               <AccountingDocumentType>DR</AccountingDocumentType>
               <DocumentReferenceID></DocumentReferenceID>
               <DocumentHeaderText>Test AR Item Posting</DocumentHeaderText>
               <CreatedByUser>CB9980000014</CreatedByUser>
               <CompanyCode>1510</CompanyCode>
               <DocumentDate>2024-08-15</DocumentDate>
               <PostingDate>2024-08-15</PostingDate>
               <Reference1InDocumentHeader>12345678901234567890</Reference1InDocumentHeader>
               <Reference2InDocumentHeader>1234567890</Reference2InDocumentHeader>
               <Item>
                  <!--Optional:-->
                  <ReferenceDocumentItem>1</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                  <GLAccount>0041000400</GLAccount>
                  <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="JPY">-1000</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
                  <DebitCreditCode>H</DebitCreditCode>
                  <DocumentItemText>Test Item 2</DocumentItemText>
                  <AssignmentReference>123</AssignmentReference>
                  <Tax>
                     <TaxCode>A3</TaxCode>
                  </Tax>
                  <AccountAssignment>
                     <ProfitCenter>YB600</ProfitCenter>
                     <Segment>1000_C</Segment>
                     <FunctionalArea>YB30</FunctionalArea>
                  </AccountAssignment>
                  <ProfitabilitySupplement>
                     <Customer>1000003</Customer>
                  </ProfitabilitySupplement>
               </Item>
               <!--Zero or more repetitions:-->
               <DebtorItem>
                  <ReferenceDocumentItem>2</ReferenceDocumentItem>
                  <Debtor>1000003</Debtor>
                  <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="JPY">1100</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
                  <DebitCreditCode>S</DebitCreditCode>
                  <DocumentItemText>Customer item 1</DocumentItemText>
               </DebtorItem>
               <ProductTaxItem>
                  <!--<ReferenceDocumentItem></ReferenceDocumentItem>-->
                  <TaxCode>A3</TaxCode>
                  <TaxItemClassification>MWS</TaxItemClassification>
                  <AmountInTransactionCurrency currencyCode="JPY">-100</AmountInTransactionCurrency>
                  <DebitCreditCode>H</DebitCreditCode>
                  <TaxBaseAmountInTransCrcy currencyCode="JPY">-1000</TaxBaseAmountInTransCrcy>
               </ProductTaxItem>
            </JournalEntry>
         </JournalEntryCreateRequest>
      </sfin:JournalEntryBulkCreateRequest>
   </soapenv:Body>
</soapenv:Envelope>

【Error Detail】
<soap-env:Envelope xmlns:soap-env="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/">
    <soap-env:Header/>
    <soap-env:Body>
        <n0:JournalEntryBulkCreateConfirmation xmlns:n0="http://sap.com/xi/SAPSCORE/SFIN" xmlns:prx="urn:sap.com:proxy:JRZ:/1SAI/TAS3D871C7855B59197A671:912">
            <MessageHeader>
                <UUID>8d26d281-126b-1edf-97eb-2b0e040e9909</UUID>
                <ReferenceID>MSG_2018-06-05</ReferenceID>
                <CreationDateTime>2024-08-21T01:04:41.257674Z</CreationDateTime>
                <SenderBusinessSystemID>JRZ</SenderBusinessSystemID>
            </MessageHeader>
            <ConfirmationInterfaceOrignName/>
            <JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>
                <MessageHeader>
                    <UUID>8d26d281-126b-1edf-97eb-2b0e040eb909</UUID>
                    <ReferenceID>SUB_MSG_2018-06-05</ReferenceID>
                    <CreationDateTime>2024-08-21T01:04:41.257691Z</CreationDateTime>
                </MessageHeader>
                <JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>
                    <AccountingDocument>0000000000</AccountingDocument>
                    <CompanyCode>1510</CompanyCode>
                    <FiscalYear>2024</FiscalYear>
                </JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>
                <Log>
                    <MaximumLogItemSeverityCode>3</MaximumLogItemSeverityCode>
                    <Item>
                        <TypeID>609(RW)</TypeID>
                        <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>
                        <Note>Error in document: BKPFF $ 0M5R9UL</Note>
                        <WebURI>http://vhshpjrzci.shp.gcp5301.s4h.sap.corp:50000/sap/xi/docu_apperror?ID=NA&OBJECT=RW609&LANGUAGE=E&MSGV1=BKPFF&MSGV2=%24&MSGV3=0M5R9UL</WebURI>
                    </Item>
                    <Item>
                        <TypeID>008(FOT_TDT)</TypeID>
                        <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>
                        <Note>Time dependent taxes: tax date has to be filled from caller</Note>
                    </Item>
                    <Item>
                        <TypeID>012(FOT_TDT)</TypeID>
                        <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>
                        <Note>For tax code A3, the key date 00/00/0000 does not fall in any validity period</Note>
                        <WebURI>http://vhshpjrzci.shp.gcp5301.s4h.sap.corp:50000/sap/xi/docu_apperror?ID=NA&OBJECT=FOT_TDT012&LANGUAGE=E&MSGV1=A3&MSGV2=00%2f00%2f0000</WebURI>
                    </Item>
                    <Item>
                        <TypeID>825(FF)</TypeID>
                        <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>
                        <Note>No tax rate defined for company code 1510 transaction FTXP A3</Note>
                    </Item>
                    <Item>
                        <TypeID>507(F5)</TypeID>
                        <SeverityCode>3</SeverityCode>
                        <Note>G/L account  is not defined in chart of accounts YCOA</Note>
                        <WebURI>http://vhshpjrzci.shp.gcp5301.s4h.sap.corp:50000/sap/xi/docu_apperror?ID=NA&OBJECT=F5507&LANGUAGE=E&MSGV2=YCOA</WebURI>
                    </Item>
                </Log>
            </JournalEntryCreateConfirmation>
            <Log/>
        </n0:JournalEntryBulkCreateConfirmation>
    </soap-env:Body>
</soap-env:Envelope>

entry.title: Unable to deploy iFlow in Integration Suite for AzureStorage List Blobs
entry.content:
Hi all,

we have tried to connect our azure blob storage via iflow and the azure storage adapter version 1.0.4 with the function list blobs. During deployment we receive the following error message:

[CONTENT][CONTENT_DEPLOY][RuntimeError] : {"message":"EXCEPTION","parameters":["org.apache.camel.FailedToCreateRouteException: Failed to create route Process_1 at: >>> To[sap-it-azure-storage:foo?receiverContainerName=aussendienstfiles&pageSize=200&receiverAccountName=stouvreisekosten&receiverResponseFormat=default&processInPages=false&sasToken=st=2024-08-22T07:53:12Z&se=2099-08-22T15:53:12Z&si=SAP Read Delete&spr=https&sv=2022-11-02&sr=c&sig=VQsEY6cnmX9XZoCTwmW1Y0iEK3I8eXVWctC2l6u0mI4%3D&receiverAuthorization=SASTOKEN&timeOut=60000&blob=ListBlobs&requestHeaders=x-ms-blob-type=blockblob] <<< in route: Route(Process_1)[[From[direct:test_azure_TimerEventDefinitio... because of Failed to resolve endpoint: sap-it-azure-storage://foo?blob=ListBlobs&pageSize=200&processInPages=false&receiverAccountName=stouvreisekosten&receiverAuthorization=SASTOKEN&receiverContainerName=aussendienstfiles&receiverResponseFormat=default&requestHeaders=x-ms-blob-type%3Dblockblob&sasToken=st%3D2024-08-22T07%3A53%3A12Z&se=2099-08-22T15%3A53%3A12Z&si=SAP+Read+Delete&sig=VQsEY6cnmX9XZoCTwmW1Y0iEK3I8eXVWctC2l6u0mI4%3D&spr=https&sr=c&sv=2022-11-02&timeOut=60000 due to: Failed to resolve endpoint: sap-it-azure-storage://foo?blob=ListBlobs&pageSize=200&processInPages=false&receiverAccountName=stouvreisekosten&receiverAuthorization=SASTOKEN&receiverContainerName=aussendienstfiles&receiverResponseFormat=default&requestHeaders=x-ms-blob-type%3Dblockblob&sasToken=st%3D2024-08-22T07%3A53%3A12Z&se=2099-08-22T15%3A53%3A12Z&si=SAP+Read+Delete&sig=VQsEY6cnmX9XZoCTwmW1Y0iEK3I8eXVWctC2l6u0mI4%3D&spr=https&sr=c&sv=2022-11-02&timeOut=60000 due to: There are 6 parameters that couldn't be set on the endpoint. Check the uri if the parameters are spelt correctly and that they are properties of the endpoint. Unknown parameters=[{se=2099-08-22T15:53:12Z, si=SAP Read Delete, sig=VQsEY6cnmX9XZoCTwmW1Y0iEK3I8eXVWctC2l6u0mI4=, spr=https, sr=c, sv=2022-11-02}]"],"childMessageInstances":[{"message":"CAUSE","parameters":["org.apache.camel.ResolveEndpointFailedException: Failed to resolve endpoint: sap-it-azure-storage://foo?blob=ListBlobs&pageSize=200&processInPages=false&receiverAccountName=stouvreisekosten&receiverAuthorization=SASTOKEN&receiverContainerName=aussendienstfiles&receiverResponseFormat=default&requestHeaders=x-ms-blob-type%3Dblockblob&sasToken=st%3D2024-08-22T07%3A53%3A12Z&se=2099-08-22T15%3A53%3A12Z&si=SAP+Read+Delete&sig=VQsEY6cnmX9XZoCTwmW1Y0iEK3I8eXVWctC2l6u0mI4%3D&spr=https&sr=c&sv=2022-11-02&timeOut=60000 due to: Failed to resolve endpoint: sap-it-azure-storage://foo?blob=ListBlobs&pageSize=200&processInPages=false&receiverAccountName=stouvreisekosten&receiverAuthorization=SASTOKEN&receiverContainerName=aussendienstfiles&receiverResponseFormat=default&requestHeaders=x-ms-blob-type%3Dblockblob&sasToken=st%3D2024-08-22T07%3A53%3A12Z&se=2099-08-22T15%3A53%3A12Z&si=SAP+Read+Delete&sig=VQsEY6cnmX9XZoCTwmW1Y0iEK3I8eXVWctC2l6u0mI4%3D&spr=https&sr=c&sv=2022-11-02&timeOut=60000 due to: There are 6 parameters that couldn't be set on the endpoint. Check the uri if the parameters are spelt correctly and that they are properties of the endpoint. Unknown parameters=[{se=2099-08-22T15:53:12Z, si=SAP Read Delete, sig=VQsEY6cnmX9XZoCTwmW1Y0iEK3I8eXVWctC2l6u0mI4=, spr=https, sr=c, sv=2022-11-02}]"],"childMessageInstances":[{"message":"CAUSE","parameters":["org.apache.camel.ResolveEndpointFailedException: Failed to resolve endpoint: sap-it-azure-storage://foo?blob=ListBlobs&pageSize=200&processInPages=false&receiverAccountName=stouvreisekosten&receiverAuthorization=SASTOKEN&receiverContainerName=aussendienstfiles&receiverResponseFormat=default&requestHeaders=x-ms-blob-type%3Dblockblob&sasToken=st%3D2024-08-22T07%3A53%3A12Z&se=2099-08-22T15%3A53%3A12Z&si=SAP+Read+Delete&sig=VQsEY6cnmX9XZoCTwmW1Y0iEK3I8eXVWctC2l6u0mI4%3D&spr=https&sr=c&sv=2022-11-02&timeOut=60000 due to: There are 6 parameters that couldn't be set on the endpoint. Check the uri if the parameters are spelt correctly and that they are properties of the endpoint. Unknown parameters=[{se=2099-08-22T15:53:12Z, si=SAP Read Delete, sig=VQsEY6cnmX9XZoCTwmW1Y0iEK3I8eXVWctC2l6u0mI4=, spr=https, sr=c, sv=2022-11-02}]"]}]}]}

The following settings are stored in the adapter:

In addition, we have adhered to the following blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/steps-to-access-azure-blob-storage-via-rest-api-from-sap-cpi-using-azure/ba-p/13580257

Unfortunately we could not find any hint in the logging on azure side, why we get this error.

Do you have any ideas as to what the problem might be and how we can solve it?

Thanks a lot and best regards,

Olli

entry.title: Host Alias in SAP Integration Suite Trial
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm currently trying to use the SAP Integration Suite Trial to work trough different tutorials. In particular I tried the following two tutorials:

  • https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-with-sap-integration-suite/creating-an-api_b3973a9a-62ce-4a5e-b59a-c0ddf6924de5
  • https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hcp-apim-create-api.html

The problem with the Integration Suite Trial is, that the Host Alias, which is generated for an API Proxy, can not be changed. At least I didn't find any option to do so. As a result it is not possible to follow the two tutorials mentioned above completely.

I found the following question related to the issue: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/developing-with-sap-integration-suite-how-to-modify-the-api-proxy-host-name/qaq-p/224504. This post shows that it is possible to invoke the API Proxy by manually adjusting the URL in the test environment.

Is there any way to change the Host Alias for a generated API Proxy in the trail environment?

Christian

entry.title: Special character # -issue in the file generated
entry.content:
hi All,

We are using SAP Integration Suite for converting the input XML file into a fixed-length flat file and placing it in the AL11 directory of the SAP system. The file present in the AL11 folder does not contain the ‘#’ character at the end of each line, but while processing it further in the SAP system, the records shows ‘#’ at the end, due to which it cannot be processed further. There is standard SAP ABAP code and we cannot alter it to ignore this special character

Could anybody advice the possible reason and resolution for this?Could this be added by the Integration layer. 

flat file being generated 

 

Processing records at SAP

entry.title: Getting error with SF-OCN integration
entry.content:
I am trying to do an integration with salesforce and CPI by the help of open connectors.
I am getting 200 response in API docs but when I am using in CPI I am getting error.
PLease help.

entry.title: How to disable the company SSO when logging client's BTP env?
entry.content:
Hi BTP experts,

We got the BTP development env URL and user credential from our client, however when try to open, our SAP laptop will always automatically use our company SSO, but since the user account is belonging to external IdP, hence it is always failed (refer to attachment). If I open it on my own PC or mobile browser, it is fine (will prompt user / password input window, see attachment).

May I know, can we disable such auto SSO for dedicated BTP URL of client env, so that it will prompt user / password window rather than using company SSO?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: SAP Ariba Integration with S/4HANA Public Cloud for Business Partner replication using SOAP API's
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we are integrated from Ariba to S/4 HANA Public Cloud using SOAP APIs using Managed Gateways Passthrough integration via BTP Master Data Integration.

  • We are created Instances services as Master Data Integration and Subscription services as Master Data Integration (Orchestration).
  • We have use this JSON below to create the service instance.

 

{
    "application": "s4",
    "businessSystemId": "<businessSystemId>", //Business System ID is SAP S/4HANA Cloud system this value is can be found under Communication systems tile and then filter by Own System.
    "enableTenantDeletion": false,
    "globalTenantId": "<subaccount Id under Service Key>",
    "logSys": "<Same logsys configure in S4PC>",
    "writePermissions": [
        {
            "entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.BusinessPartner"
        },
        {
            "entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.BusinessPartnerRelationship"
        }
    ],
    "xs-security": {
        "xsappname": "<a unique v4 UUID can be used>",
        "authorities": [
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.BPCommonRead",
            "$XSMASTERAPPNAME.BPSensitiveDataRead"
        ]
    }
}

 

  • Created new project in managed gateway to connection from Managed Gateway to MDI (BTP). We are encountering a 404 error while testing the connection. 

    Configure in CIG inbound URL is https://<one-mds.cfapps.<region>.hana.ondemand.com>/businesspartner/v0/soap/BusinessPartnerBulkReplicateRequestIn?tenantId=<identityzone>

    For basic authentication, specify the following:
    User: Value of clientid from the Service key
    Password: Value of clientsecret from the Service key
  • While triggering business partner replication from S4PC its successfully reaching BTP but not in Ariba (Manage Gateway).
  • How to send master data from MDI to Ariba solution?
  • Can you please share configuration guide for this?

Could you please help me on this Integration connection.

Below are the links we referenced and created the MDI integration.

About Supplier Data Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Using SAP Master Data Integration | SAP Help Portal

Configuring SOAP Outbound Destinations to the SAP Integration Suite, managed gateway for spend management and SAP Business Network in SAP Master Data Integration | SAP Help Portal

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/configuring-sap-master-data-integration-service-for-business-partner/ba-p/13543017

Thanks & Regards,

Thouheed

entry.title: Groovy Script for removing reserved character inside XML node
entry.content:
Dear CPI experts. 

Good day, 

Looking to get assistance with my requirement below. 

The idea is to remove all below reserved characters from inside the all XML nodes if they are present.

However below script im trying to work with, but does not work. It is not preserving the XML structure hence the entire output is incorrect.

reserved characters *%?:;=()[]|#@

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil
import groovy.util.XmlSlurper

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def body = message.getBody(String) 

    def root = new XmlSlurper().parseText(body)

    def cleanNodeContent
    cleanNodeContent = { node ->
        if (node instanceof groovy.util.slurpersupport.NodeChild) {
            if (node.text()) {
                // Remove reserved characters: *%?:;=()[]|#@
                def cleanedText = node.text().replaceAll('[*%?:;=()\\[\\]\\|#@]', '')
                node.setValue(cleanedText)
            }
        }

        node.children().each { child ->
            cleanNodeContent(child)
        }
    }

    cleanNodeContent(root)

    def cleanedXml = XmlUtil.serialize(root)

    message.setBody(cleanedXml) // Set the modified body back to the message
    return message
}

 #

entry.title: Read/validate xml namespace using groovy script in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts

 

Any idea how to read incoming xml namespace using groovy script ?

Requirement is to validate namespace and if it does not match the correct version, fail the iflow.

I was also thinking abt XSLT but how do I then fail the iflow it version does not match?

<xsl:if test="//namespace::*[.!='http://testns/2.6']">

Thanks

entry.title: Error P014: Activation of Cloud Integration capability has failed.
entry.content:
Hello SAP.

I am taking the https://training.sap.com/certification/c_cpi_2404-sap-certified-associate---integration-developer-g/?.

Following this guide and things are working fine: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/hcp-create-trial-account.html

Then I am trying to set up the Integration Suit Trial following this guide: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-starter-isuite-onboard-subscribe..html

In step four, I am trying to add the cloud integration capability and getting the error as seen in image 104056.

I also tried to access SAP Note 2904202: 

when redirected to 2904202, it is empty as in image 105038.

I have been unable to find anything with a similar errortype in the community.

I have tried to delete all subscriptions and then resubscribe them. I have also tried to removed all entitlements and give them again with any success.

As a last resort a tried deleting the entire trial and start a new and end up with the same error P014: Activation of cloud integration capability has failed.

entry.title: Error P014 when activating Cloud Integration in my account
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to activate Cloud Integration in the Integration Suite and error P014 is occurring as shown in the attached image
Could you help me?

Thanks.

entry.title: My Integration Suite was deleted automatically, now it is not showing under Subscriptions
Integration Suite Error - ScriptCollectionException - Reusable_Groovy_Scripts_V2 are not available
entry.content:
I am just getting started with SAP Integration Suite. Could someone explain what I am doing wrong that is causing the artifact to fail. See log below. I have deployed an artifact to retrieve a test PO file and pass file to Process Direct for further processing. See Print Screen below. I have deployed Resuable Groovy Script from Cloud Integration - Trading Partner Management V2.

 

 

Error Log

com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.processor.ScriptCollectionException: Service references of CompiledScriptProvider for referenced script collection Reusable_Groovy_Scripts_V2are not available

Message Processing Log:

  ArchivingSenderChannelMessages= false

  ContextName         = HomeDepot_COMM_PROCESSDIRECT_SFTP_SENDER
  CorrelationId       = AGbPR9yP5kmAeNnJgnZ5eG-IaEoj
  IntermediateError   = true

  LastErrorModelStepId= MessageFlow_6

  PreviousComponentName= CPI_dev-btp
  TransactionId       = 142aec28a65b4bdea83dddd5ab0ea019

Segment:

entry.title: Error oData Iflow in CPI - java.util.ArrayList cannot be cast to java.util.HashMap
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have an iflow with oData service in CPI, and when consume with Postman, I have the following error when the response returns multilple records:

java.lang.ClassCastException: java.util.ArrayList (loaded by <bootstrap>) cannot be cast to java.util.HashMap (loaded by <bootstrap>)

Any suggest what may be happening?

Attached EDMX model and xml response.

Thanks.

entry.title: Cloud Integration - Advanced Event Mesh Adapter Issue
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to use the "Advanced Event Mesh" Adapter from Cloud Integration. However, when I publish a message to a topic, I encounter the following error:

  • org.apache.camel.RuntimeCamelException: A reply was not received within the allotted time [1000 ms]


The message is correctly published in the AEM, I can see it in the subscribed queue, but the adapter still throws the error, even when publication went fine.

This is my configuration:

Could you please assist with this issue? I'd like to use this adapter, but the iFlow encounters an error even when the publishing seems to work fine.

P.S.: This very same iFlow works completely fine with the "AMQP" Receiver adapter, but I'd like to take advantage of the dedicated adapter's enhanced functionality.

Thank you!
